text: Science has a clearer story about clock genes PER than social media does. Clock genes, like PER, regulate our daily rhythms. But what does that really mean? These genes influence sleep, metabolism, and even mood. Surprising, right? Studies show disruptions in PER can lead to serious health issues. There’s more at stake than you think. Understanding these genes empowers us to improve our well-being. It’s a game changer! Curious about your own clock genes? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
